<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Archive Evaluator Variant"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/evaluators/variants/{evaluator_variant_id}/archive"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Soft-delete an evaluator variant.

Sets `deleted_at` on the variant. Its revisions stay resolvable
by id; they are hidden from `/query` unless the caller sets
`include_archived=true`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}

</Heading>
